recommendations.title: Wolfwalkers
recommendations.overview: In a time of superstition and magic, when wolves are seen as demonic and nature an evil to be tamed, a young apprentice hunter comes to Ireland with her father to wipe out the last pack. But when she saves a wild native girl, their friendship leads h

recommendations.title: Song of the Sea
recommendations.overview: The story of the last Seal Child’s journey home. After their mother’s disappearance, Ben and Saoirse are sent to live with Granny in the city. When they resolve to return to their home by the sea, their journey becomes a race against time as they are

recommendations.title: Hotarubi no Mori e
recommendations.overview: One hot summer day a little girl gets lost in an enchanted forest of the mountain god where spirits reside. A young boy appears before her, but she cannot touch him for fear of making him disappear. And so a wondrous adventure awaits...

recommendations.title: Kahlil Gibran's The Prophet
recommendations.overview: Exiled artist and poet Mustafa embarks on a journey home with his housekeeper and her daughter; together the trio must evade the authorities who fear that the truth in Mustafa's words will incite rebellion.
recommendations.director: Roger Allers, Bill Plympton, Mohammad Saeed Harib, Tomm Moore, Nina Paley, Joan C. Gratz, Michał Socha, Joann Sfar, Paul Brizzi, Gaëtan Brizzi

recommendations.title: Castle in the Sky
recommendations.overview: A young boy and a girl with a magic crystal must race against pirates and foreign agents in a search for a legendary floating castle.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Epic Tails
recommendations.overview: An adventurous mouse sets off to battle dangerous creatures in Ancient Greece, including Poseidon.

recommendations.title: Legend of the BoneKnapper Dragon
recommendations.overview: Hiccup and friends accompany their mentor, Gobber, on a quest to kill the legendary Boneknapper Dragon.

recommendations.title: Deep
recommendations.overview: In 2100, when humanity has abandoned the earth, a colony of extravagant creatures still thrives in the deepest abyss of the ocean.
